title: cacalia squamulosa
intro: Cacalia squamulosa, also known as the scaly cacalia or hairy leaf cacalia, is a type of flowering plant in the sunflower family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The medicinal properties of Cacalia squamulosa are said to provide various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting antioxidant and antimicrobial activities. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction or infusion, and is sometimes used as a component in herbal teas and tinctures.
